title: Faster Happy Ghasts
description: This datapack adds an enchantment for Harnesses that makes Happy Ghasts faster!
body: This datapack is a standalone version of [uiinpui's Enchantments](https://modrinth.com/datapack/uiinpuis-enchantments-new) that only adds the Swift Soar enchantment, making happy ghasts 10% faster each level up to 30% at the max level of 3. You have to put this enchantment on harnesses.
